definitions.text: suffiks i betegnelse for enkelte gasser
definitions.translation: suffix in designation for certain gases

definitions.text: i ord som krypton, neon og radon
definitions.translation: in words like krypton, neon, and radon

definitions.text: suffiks i betegnelse for enkelte organiske forbindelser
definitions.translation: suffix in designation for certain organic compounds

definitions.text: i ord som aceton og keton
definitions.translation: in words like acetone and ketone
suffix in designation for elementary particles

definitions.text: i ord som foton, nøytron og proton
definitions.translation: in words like photon, neutron, and proton
